ordered_steps.name: Load eligible source intake handoff and blocker records
Segment eligible source text or extracted evidence into atomic semantic units
Classify task, actor, surface, action, input, state, message, constraint, and gap candidates
Map eligible units into current PRD inventory schema element types
Record adopt, normalize, clarify, reject conflict, or route product gap decisions
Record inference records, derived decisions, and input obligations
Run structural completion review and product expansion checks
Create handoff for interaction closure with eligible and blocked units

canonical_eligibility_rules: SOURCE_EXPLICIT may be ELIGIBLE when source is eligible and row maps to a supported element type.
DEDUCTIVE_NECESSITY may be ELIGIBLE only when premises and necessity_basis are complete and no product expansion risk is present.
INDUCTIVE_CANDIDATE must be BLOCKED_PENDING_HUMAN unless a human decision resolves it.
Conflicting source claims must be REJECTED or BLOCKED_PENDING_HUMAN until resolved.
Rows that require new product capability must route to product_expansion_gaps.
forbidden_behaviors: merge multiple semantic claims into one inventory row
use P3 semantic family names as PRD element schema enum values
treat input obligations as product capability approval
let an unresolved product expansion gap feed interaction closure as eligible
